name: carbon_border_adjustment_steel_imports_layoffs
premise: Commerce undersecretary Casey Ulman must decide whether to apply the new carbon border adjustment to imported rebar arriving tomorrow, triggering layoffs at three domestic fabricators who still use blast furnaces. Union rep Xena Lee argues delaying the tariff rewards carbon leakage and harms greener domestic mini-mill competitors. Applying immediately may shutter plants in economically depressed counties before transition funds arrive. External scrutiny from regulators and community observers has intensified because the outcome could redefine expectations in Trade Policy. The dilemma is widely framed as a justice vs mercy tradeoff under incomplete information and tightening deadlines that discourage indefinite delay. Casey Ulman understands that Xena Lee will interpret the first public commitment as a signal about which obligations the organization treats as overriding when facts remain ambiguous.

agents.name: Casey Ulman
agents.identity: I am the Commerce undersecretary implementing border carbon measures while coordinating with Labor on just transition grants that are not yet obligated.
agents.goal: I want carbon leakage closed without pushing thousands into unemployment overnight without funded bridges.

agents.name: Xena Lee
agents.identity: I am a steelworkers union representative who filed for rapid response grants and who opposes any tariff start date before cash hits worker accounts.
agents.goal: I want a ninety-day grace with binding layoff aversion plans signed by importers and domestic mills alike.

choices: I will apply the adjustment immediately and air-drop rapid response teams with expedited grant paperwork, accepting layoff spikes if paperwork lags behind plant closures.
I will delay application ninety days with binding decarbonization milestones for both importers and domestic blast mills, accepting continued carbon leakage and WTO complaint risk.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The White House chief of staff wants Casey Ulman's memo before the cargo docks. Casey Ulman must choose between immediate border adjustment or a ninety-day grace with milestones. What does Casey Ulman do?
